description.p1:
A [[Lunar studio]] that brings your brand story to life,
going beyond simply designing or building websites,
understanding our clients' [[challenges and aspirations]]
and completing everything with [[strategy and emotion]]
 that perfectly fits the brand.
description.p2:
At Lunar Studio, instead of relying on experience, we use [[careful analysis]] and a [[personalized approach]]
to clearly convey the message your brand truly wants to deliver,
and create results that resonate and are loved by your audience.
description.p3:
With 99% [[strategic planning]] and 1% [[instinct]],
we create experiences that are memorable for the brand 
 and satisfying for the user.

niji.name: Niji
niji.description: Niji is a website project created for a Japanese sushi restaurant. The design and user experience were carefully refined to provide a unique online experience.

details.problem: The original site was hosted on PythonAnywhere with outdated technologies and unnecessary database dependencies, making updates and maintenance cumbersome.
approach: Migrated the website to WordPress for a more flexible platform
Simplified backend structure by removing redundant systems
Improved accessibility and ease of navigation
details.solution: The redesigned website is now clean, accessible, and easy to maintain, with a modern interface that enhances user experience and streamlines content management.

seraphine.name: Seraphine Preschool
seraphine.description: Seraphine Preschool is a website project for an early childhood education center. The project focused on redefining the user experience and aligning the overall design with the brand identity.

details.problem: The client initially requested minor edits to a self-built website. However, from a UX/UI perspective, the structure and design lacked clarity, consistency, and did not effectively reflect the brand identity.
approach: Re-evaluated the entire website structure from a UX/UI perspective
Redesigned the layout to better align with the preschool’s brand identity
Improved information hierarchy for parents to easily understand key content
Enhanced overall usability and navigation flow
Refined visual elements for a more warm and trustworthy impression
details.solution: The website was fully redesigned to deliver a clear, cohesive, and user-friendly experience. It now effectively communicates the brand’s values while making it easy for parents to explore information and take action.

playingmore.name: Playingmore
playingmore.description: Playingmore is an e-commerce website project for a lifestyle and pet-related brand. The project focused on creating a warm, engaging brand experience while improving overall usability and visual consistency.

details.problem: The existing website lacked a cohesive brand identity and had inconsistencies in layout and visual structure. This made it difficult to deliver a clear brand message and reduced overall user engagement.
approach: Refined the overall website structure to create a more intuitive user flow
Redesigned key pages to better reflect the brand’s emotional and lifestyle-driven identity
Improved visual consistency across typography, color, and layout
Enhanced product presentation to increase engagement and clarity
Optimized the site for a smoother browsing experience across devices
details.solution: The redesigned website now delivers a cohesive and emotionally engaging brand experience. With improved usability and a refined visual system, users can easily explore products while naturally connecting with the brand’s identity.

timebeau.name: TimeBeau Clinic
timebeau.description: TimeBeau Clinic is a multilingual website project for a beauty clinic. The project focused on delivering a refined brand experience while ensuring accessibility for a global audience.

details.problem: The clinic required a website that could effectively communicate its brand identity to both local and international audiences. However, the absence of a structured multilingual system and cohesive design made it difficult to deliver a consistent user experience.
approach: Designed and implemented a multilingual website structure for global accessibility
Aligned the overall design with the clinic’s premium and trustworthy brand identity
Structured content to ensure clarity across different languages
Optimized user flow for consultation and booking inquiries
Maintained visual consistency across all language versions
details.solution: The final website delivers a cohesive and premium brand experience across multiple languages. It allows users from different regions to easily access information and engage with the clinic, while maintaining a consistent and polished interface.

whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.stat1Desc: For over tow years, we’ve been shaping digital experiences and building strong brands.
whyChooseUs.stat1DescHighlight: Our years of knowledge ensure every project is backed by skill, strategy, and creativity.
whyChooseUs.stat2Desc: We measure success by the impact we create. With a near-perfect satisfaction rate,
whyChooseUs.stat2DescHighlight: our clients trust us to deliver solutions that exceed expectations every time.

items.a1: We provide comprehensive branding, web design, and digital strategy services tailored to your business needs.
items.q2: How long does a project take?
items.a2: Typically, a standard project takes 4-8 weeks depending on the complexity and feedback cycles.
items.q3: Do you work with all industries?
items.a3: Yes, we have experience across tech, fashion, lifestyle, and corporate sectors.
items.a4: Absolutely. We offer flexible packages that can be adjusted based on your specific goals.
items.a5: Just click the 'Ask a Question' button below or contact us via email to schedule an initial consultation.
